basics.name: Ankit Shaw
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
basics.summary: Forward Deployed Engineer focused on deterministic AI systems, workflow optimization, and prediction pipelines for real business operations. Built an ML-powered QA automation engine at Aptiv that prioritized test cases and detected failures earlier, saving 4 hours of manual QA effort every week. Helps solopreneurs and small to medium businesses move from AI prototypes to reliable operational systems.

work.name: Aptiv
highlights: Built an ML pipeline to automate and prioritize test cases for failure detection.
Used model-driven prioritization to detect likely failures before they escalated in the QA workflow.
Saved 4 hours of manual QA effort every week.
